title: crotalaria egregia
intro: Crotalaria egregia, also known as the "Coral Plant," is a perennial plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The leaves and roots of the Crotalaria egregia plant are rich in alkaloids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
